Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.Resource

Packages that use Resource
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video Capabilites to handle video resources, layout and rendering. 
 

Uses of Resource in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Subinterfaces of Resource in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 interface Player
          Defines methods for playing one or more media streams.
 interface Recorder
          Defines a method for recording media stream(s) into a MediaStreamContainer (usually a data file).
 

Uses of Resource in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 

Subinterfaces of Resource in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 interface SignalDetector
          Interface for detecting signals from the network.
 interface SignalGenerator
          Defines methods for sending signals out to the network.
 

Uses of Resource in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Subinterfaces of Resource in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 interface SdpPortManager
          Handle a set of media ports, defined by a pair of Session Descriptions.
 

Uses of Resource in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video
 

Subinterfaces of Resource in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video
 interface VideoRenderer
          A Resource capable of building an image for an output video stream.
